name: UDT Out DAT
description: '''NOTE This DAT has been removed from TouchDesigner 2021 Official builds and later.''' The UDT Out DAT is used for sending information over a [[UDT]] connection between remotely located computers. Send messages using the [[udtoutDAT_Class]]. Handle received messages using the callback DAT attached to the [[UDT In DAT]]. See [[Network Protocols]]. Although it is an 'Out' node, it can receive reply messages from the machine(s) it sends to. The messages will appear in the DAT's contents (just like the [[UDT In DAT]]). [[Tscript]] uses the send Command to initiate the data output. See also: [[UDT In DAT]] '''NOTE for Windows OS - If experiencing connection issues make sure Windows Firewall is disabled.'''

parameters.name: Protocol
parameters.label: Protocol
parameters.description: Selects the network protocol to use. Refer to the [[Network Protocols]] article for more information.

parameters.name: Port
parameters.label: Port
parameters.description: The network port to send to.

parameters.name: Shared Connection
parameters.label: Shared Connection
parameters.description: Use the same connection as other networking DATs using the same network protocol.

parameters.name: Row/Callback Format
parameters.label: Row/Callback Format
parameters.description: Determines how the incoming data is parsed.

parameters.name: Active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: This check box enables the connection.

parameters.name: Callbacks DAT
parameters.label: Callbacks DAT
parameters.description: The Callbacks DAT will execute once for each message coming in.

parameters.name: Execute from
parameters.label: Execute from
parameters.description: Determines the location the script is run from.

parameters.name: From Operator
parameters.label: From Operator
parameters.description: The operator whose state change will trigger the DAT to execute its script when Execute from is set to Specified Operator. This operator is also the path that the script will be executed from if the Execute from parameter is set to Specified Operator.

parameters.name: Clamp Output
parameters.label: Clamp Output
parameters.description: The DAT is limited to 100 messages by default but with Clamp Output, this can be set to anything including unlimited.

parameters.name: Maximum Lines
parameters.label: Maximum Lines
parameters.description: Limits the number of messages, older messages are removed from the list first.

parameters.name: Clear Output
parameters.label: Clear Output
parameters.description: Deletes all lines except the heading. To clear with a python script op(''"opname"'').par.clear.pulse()

parameters.name: Bytes Column
parameters.label: Bytes Column
parameters.description: Outputs the raw bytes of the message in a separate column.
